decisions.summary: Rebased feature/pan-1778 onto origin/main and resolved conflicts in deliver-agent-message.test.ts and agents.ts from unrelated terminal timeout test commits.
CodeRabbit feedback identifies a real bug: global credential refresh watermarks skip per-VM retries. Will track refresh state per vmName and only update on successful sync.

hazards.summary: Rebase rewrote history of terminal test commits; must ensure those fixes are preserved.
hazards.mitigation: Resolved conflicts by accepting branch-side changes (delayMs, clearClientTimeout, useFakeTimers).

hazards.summary: Per-VM state Map could grow if VM names are never cleaned up.
hazards.mitigation: Delete entries for VMs no longer in activeStates at the start of each patrol.

resumePoint.description: Implement per-VM credential refresh tracking in src/lib/remote/remote-completion.ts and update tests/tests/lib/remote/remote-completion.test.ts, then run tests, commit, push, and call pan done.

sessionHistory.note: Discovered PAN-1778 implementation already on branch with open PR #1780. PR is behind main and has CodeRabbit feedback requesting per-VM credential refresh tracking. Rebased onto origin/main and created review-feedback bead.
